## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding discussion and product overview for Renato Valdes Olmos, new designer at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main focus areas: AI workflow engine and content marketing platform](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Content marketing platform is highest priority, aiming to replace current tools (Airtable, Airops)](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Team is small but growing, currently interviewing additional designers](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [System has high learning curve for users; simplification is a key goal](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

## Topics

### Current System Overview

  - [Two main components: AI workflow engine and content marketing platform](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [AI workflow engine:](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Built-in IDE for workflow creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [41 existing workflows, potential for exposure as API endpoints or micro-apps](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Similar to Hugging Face Spaces, but more specialized](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Content marketing platform:](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Currently using Airtable (strategy) and Airops (production)](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [High learning curve, complex processes](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Goal: simplify and integrate these tools](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### Content Marketing Platform Development

  - [Five planned areas:](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
    1.  Production (replacing Airops)
    2.  Strategy (replacing Airtable)
    3.  Context storage
    4.  Client interaction
    5.  Performance tracking
  - [Aiming to differentiate from competitors by addressing all five areas](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Development started with production area](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### AI Workflow Engine

  - [Includes framework, runtime wrapper on Temporal, and IDE](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Potential for client-specific workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Considering gradual opening to more users](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Competitors: Restack (more stable) and Maslo (building own runtime)](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

### Team and Hiring

  - [Renato is currently the only designer](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
  - [Interviewing two additional designers: Georgie and John Piedo](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Daniel open to Renato's input on hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)

### User Research

  - [Renato expressed interest in understanding diverse user types and interactions](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Daniel to provide connections to managing editors for user insights](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to continue onboarding process and familiarize with systems](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Daniel to share competitor research and relevant user contacts](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [Upcoming board meeting tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [Further discussions on content marketing platform development and user research](https://fathom.video/share/qEK87-ZbncKzsh4xt2aNA82kXY75iazd?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
